## Browser checklist

**Desktop**

- [ ] Chrome (latest)
- [ ] Firefox (latest)
- [ ] Safari (latest)
- [ ] Edge (latest)

**Mobile**

- [ ] iOS Safari (iPhone)
- [ ] Chrome for Android
- [ ] Samsung Internet (if applicable)

## Accessibility

- [ ] Keyboard navigable (Tab / Shift+Tab / Enter / Space / Arrow keys)
- [ ] Screen reader tested (VoiceOver or NVDA)
- [ ] Color contrast passes WCAG AA
- [ ] No content relies on color alone

## General checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] No secrets or environment values in code
- [ ] Reviewed across five axes: correctness, readability, architecture, security, performance

## Five-axis self-review

| Axis         | Notes |
| ------------ | ----- |
| Correctness  |       |
| Readability  |       |
| Architecture |       |
| Security     |       |
| Performance  |       |
